items.name_en: CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
CAMERA BOX Series M82465 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 12.5*17.6*6cm ■
A must-have showpiece for autumn and winter. This camera box series is simply an instant hit!
The reversible color-block soft box design paired with a small handle makes the bag look exquisite, petite, yet elegant and sophisticated!
The four-corner hardware is heavy-duty quality, the authentic small hard suitcase standard!
Truly another "King of Hits"—not only does it have stunning looks, but it also satisfies daily capacity needs. More importantly, it offers versatile carrying styles!

items.name_cn:
STEAMER Series M81783 Uninspected Version#
▇ Size: 18*11*6.5cm ▇
A long-awaited Steamer series.
The bag size is designed just right, interpreting a style concept suitable for both men and women, full of vintage charm. The black Monogram is versatile and eye-catching, and the full leather corners add texture to the bag, creating an instant urge to buy.
The carrying effect is beyond imagination, I love it!
High capacity, a daily essential for going out, the ultimate style icon!

items.name_en: WALLET ON CHAIN LILY Series M82509 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
WALLET ON CHAIN LILY Series M82509 Uninspected Version#
❒ Size: 20.7*10.2*3.5cm ❒
I'm absolutely in love with the lily woc series!
In terms of looks, the design is stunning!
I have to say, the designer really understands what girls want. The simple body paired with unique and exquisite chains gives the bag a unique vibe!
It looks exquisite but has a very high capacity.
Suitable for all seasons, it can be used as a clutch, crossbody, shoulder bag, or underarm bag. Multiple carrying styles!
Full of atmosphere, a must-have!

items.name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44020# Uninspected YY#
▪️Size: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic masterpiece and a must-have for beginners,
the wine bag designed in 1932 for champagne delivery meets contemporary trends,
transforming into a bucket bag embodying heritage beauty,
and is even called the 'King of Classics,'
attracting people of all ages,
with a large capacity design.
This is a classic King that can accompany you through prosperity, and also a bucket bag every woman needs!

items.name_en: Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
Pochette Accessoires Series M82766 Uninspected Version
❒ Size: 23.5*13.5*4cm ❒
A classic adaptation of the Mahjong bag, retaining the original style with a simple and elegant look. The portable carrying method and upgraded capacity meet the storage needs for essential items while traveling. Includes an extra internal pocket!
Small and lightweight, the chain strap design is eye-catching. A truly legendary piece!
Another blockbuster from the Fa Bao series; the design is truly top-tier!

items.name_en: SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
items.name_cn:
SAUMUR BB Twin Star Series M46740 Uninspected Version #
❐ Size: 20*16*7.5cm ❐
The SAUMUR BB series has become a "must-have bag king". The classic monogram colorway is simple and retro. The aura of the Twin Star itself brings its own atmosphere, and the visual appeal is unexpectedly high-class!
Habitually free your hands; the strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive! One bag, multiple ways to carry, versatile for any season!
Trust me, this is a must-have; it has been a top-tier best-seller with consistent price premiums!

items.name_en: NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
NANO ALMA MINI Shell Collection M82717 Uninspected Version
■Size: 18*12*8cm ■
Nano Alma captures the essence of the classic!
A Mini refined and compact design that makes a splash, featuring a detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!
The iconic Shell silhouette, which has always held center stage since 1934, is simple yet elegant and fashionable. It is an essential 'must-have' for every girl.
Its refined and compact shape looks like a stylish pendant when worn, with enough capacity to meet daily needs!
The new design is more user-friendly, satisfying various height requirements. It's a beauty icon—promise me, you really need to get this!
